evals.prompt: hey i need to buy a yearly subscription to Acme Analytics, it's $47.99/year. their checkout is at https://acme-analytics.com/pricing, they're a US company. this is my first time using lobster btw
evals.expected_output: A plan that includes: session version check before other commands; agents list and registration (first-time user); cards request with amount 47.99 and description (not setup as first move); show approvalUrl and wait for user confirmation (no polling); cards list then cards reveal with merchant name 'Acme Analytics', URL 'https://acme-analytics.com', and country US; use revealed card details to complete checkout.
expectations: Plan includes a session version check (npm view / lobstercash --version) before any payment commands
Plan runs 'agents list' as the first lobstercash command (after version check) — before any card, crypto, or wallet commands

Plan checks 'agents list' output and matches by runtime name (e.g. Cursor selects 'Cursor', Claude Code selects 'Claude Code'); uses 'set-active' if the match isn't active; only runs 'agents register' if no matching agent exists
If registering, --image-url uses a preset from lobster.cash/agent-avatars/, a user-provided URL, or is omitted — does not invent URLs
Plan uses 'cards request' command with --amount 47.99
Plan does NOT use 'setup' as the first payment-related command (cards request bundles setup)
Plan shows approvalUrl to user and explicitly waits for user confirmation (no polling)
Plan uses 'cards list' followed by 'cards reveal' with merchant details
Plan includes merchant-name 'Acme Analytics', merchant-url containing 'acme-analytics.com', and merchant-country US in cards reveal

evals.prompt: I need to call this paid API endpoint: https://stableenrich.dev/api/v1/people/search
evals.expected_output: A plan that includes: version check; agents list and registration; lobstercash status before any crypto operation; branch for insufficient funds with crypto deposit, approval URL, wait for user, status again; lobstercash crypto x402 fetch to call the endpoint; if GET fails or returns an error, try POST; if fetch fails retry with --debug; report the API response body not payment mechanics.
expectations: Plan includes a session version check (npm view / lobstercash --version) before any payment commands
Plan runs 'agents list' as the first lobstercash command (after version check) — before any crypto or wallet commands

Plan checks 'agents list' output and matches by runtime name (e.g. Cursor selects 'Cursor', Claude Code selects 'Claude Code'); uses 'set-active' if the match isn't active; only runs 'agents register' if no matching agent exists
If registering, --image-url uses a preset from lobster.cash/agent-avatars/, a user-provided URL, or is omitted — does not invent URLs
Plan runs 'lobstercash status' before 'crypto x402 fetch' (status-before-crypto anti-pattern)
Plan uses 'crypto x402 fetch' to call the endpoint (not curl or generic HTTP)
Plan includes a strategy for trying POST if GET fails or the endpoint requires it
Plan includes a branch for insufficient funds using 'crypto deposit'
Plan mentions retrying with '--debug' flag on failure
Plan mentions reporting the API response body, not payment mechanics

evals.prompt: I used the purch skill to buy something on Amazon and it gave me back a serialized transaction: 4hXTCkRzt9WyecNzV1XPgCDfGAZzQKNxLXgynz5QDuWWPSAZBZSHptvWRL3BjCvzUXRdKvHL2b8x3GfGb. What do I do with this?
evals.expected_output: A plan that includes: version check; agents list and registration; lobstercash status to check wallet readiness before any crypto operation; crypto tx create with --type serialized and --serialized-transaction passing the base58 payload; parse the output for transactionId, messageToSign, and messageToSignEncoding; crypto tx approve with --id, --message, and --encoding; optionally crypto tx status to verify; report the explorer link to the user.
expectations: Plan includes a session version check (npm view / lobstercash --version) before any payment commands
Plan runs 'agents list' as the first lobstercash command (after version check) — before any crypto or wallet commands

Plan checks 'agents list' output and matches by runtime name (e.g. Cursor selects 'Cursor', Claude Code selects 'Claude Code'); uses 'set-active' if the match isn't active; only runs 'agents register' if no matching agent exists
If registering, --image-url uses a preset from lobster.cash/agent-avatars/, a user-provided URL, or is omitted — does not invent URLs
Plan runs 'lobstercash status' before 'crypto tx create' (status-before-crypto anti-pattern)
Plan uses 'crypto tx create' with --type serialized and --serialized-transaction
Plan parses the create output for transactionId, messageToSign, and messageToSignEncoding
Plan uses 'crypto tx approve' with --id, --message, and --encoding from the create output
Plan mentions 'crypto tx status' as a way to verify the transaction if needed
Plan reports the explorer link to the user, not raw transaction hash
